channel.title: Combined Politepol Feed
channel.description: Merged feed from multiple Politepol sources

item.title: EU mutual assistance clause is unambiguous: Macron
item.description: The EU's mutual assistance clause is unambiguous, French President Emmanuel Macron said on Saturday, after the bloc's leaders asked officials to prepare a blueprint for how it would work amid doubts over Washington's commitment to NATO. President Donald Trump's criticism of NATO for failing to bac Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Ukraine's Zelenskiy arrives in Jordan for next leg of Gulf tour
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy arrived in Jordan ‚Äãon Sunday as part of a ‚ÄåGulf tour aimed at shoring up defence ties with countries in the region amid ‚Äãrising tensions over the Iran ‚Äãwar. Zelenskiy is seeking support from Gulf ‚ÅÝstates for Ukraine's war against Russia ‚Äãas Western mili Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: France detains two more suspects over foiled Paris Bank of America attack
item.description: French authorities have arrested two more suspects over a ‚Äãfoiled attack on Bank of America‚Äôs Paris offices, the country‚Äôs anti-terrorism prosecutor‚Äôs office said ‚Äåon Sunday. ‚ÄúTwo further individuals were taken into police custody last night as part of the investigatio Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: London Jewish community ambulances set ablaze in antisemitic attack, PM says
item.description: Four ambulances belonging ‚Äãto a Jewish community organisation in north London were set ablaze overnight in what British Prime ‚ÄåMinister Keir Starmer called "a deeply shocking antisemitic arson attack". The London Fire Brigade, which sent six fire engines and 40 firefighters to the scene, said Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Russia says Ukraine controls 15‚Äì17 per cent of Donetsk region
item.description: The Russian-installed head of ‚ÄãUkraine's Donetsk region, ‚ÄåDenis Pushilin, told Russian president Vladimir Putin ‚Äãat a ‚Äãmeeting shown on state ‚ÅÝTV on Tuesday ‚Äãthat Ukraine controls around ‚Äã15-17 per cent of the region. Russia claims the whole of ‚Äãthe Donetsk region as part ‚Äãof Russia and says Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Greece sees deal to buy Italian-made frigates by April, minister says
item.description: Greece hopes to wrap up talks and sign a deal ‚Äãfor the purchase of Bergamini class ‚Äåfrigates from Italy by April, Defence Minister Nikos Dendias said in an interview ‚Äãreleased on Sunday. High-ranking officials from ‚ÄãGreece and Italy last year signed memorandums for ‚ÅÝnaval cooperation, opening Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Slovakia PM Fico to meet EU's von der Leyen to push for restart of Druzhba oil flows
item.description: Slovak Prime Minister Robert Fico said on Sunday he ‚Äåwould meet with EU chief Ursula von der Leyen on Tuesday, as Slovakia and Hungary ramp up pressure on Ukraine to restart Russian oil flows, warning Slovakia could block a major EU ‚Äãloan to Kyiv. Russian oil flows through the Druzhba pipelin Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Explosion hits US embassy in Oslo, causing minor damage, police say
item.description: The US embassy in Oslo was hit by an explosion early on Sunday, causing minor damage but no injuries, Norwegian police said. A loud blast was heard near the embassy compound in western Oslo at around 1am (0000 GMT), and smoke was seen rising from the area, eyewitnesses told local media. "We've de Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Plane carrying newly printed currency crashes, killing 15
item.description: Lockheed C-130 Hercules cargo plane carrying newly printed Bolivian banknotes crashed Friday near the capital, leaving at least 15 people dead, injuring others and damaging numerous vehicles, officials said. Defense Minister Marcelo Salinas said the aircraft skidded off the runway while landing at Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Buses, trams and trains grind to a halt across Germany at start of 2-day strike
item.description: Buses, trams and trains across Germany ground to a halt early Friday as local transport workers heeded a call by the Verdi public sector union to stage a strike on Feb 27 and 28. The union is aiming to gain leverage in negotiations that cover working conditions, specifically working hours and shif Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Cuba situation escalating, humanitarian needs must be solved: Kremlin
item.description: The Kremlin said on Thursday that the situation in Cuba was heating up and called for restraint after a deadly incident with a Florida-registered speedboat off the coast of the Caribbean island. Cuban forces killed four exiles and wounded six others who sailed into Cuban waters aboard a speedboat Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: UK to enforce travel permit requirement on foreign visitors
item.description: Starting on Wednesday, visitors to Britain from 85 countries must obtain an electronic permit in advance of their trip or they will be barred from travelling, the UK interior ministry said. The Electronic Travel Authorisation (ETA) scheme requires all visitors who do not need a visa to enter Brita Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Trump ‚Äòcancels‚Äô negotiators' trip to Pakistan: Fox News
item.description: US ‚ÄãPresident Donald ‚ÄåTrump canceled a ‚Äãplanned ‚Äãtrip to Pakistan ‚ÅÝby ‚Äãenvoys Jared ‚ÄãKushner and Steve Witkoff ‚Äãfor ‚Äãpeace talks with ‚ÄåIran, ‚ÅÝFox News reported on ‚ÄãSaturday. The ‚Äãnetwork ‚ÅÝsaid Trump ‚Äãtold ‚ÄãFox ‚ÅÝabout the ‚ÅÝtrip's ‚Äãcancellation. Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Iran rejects ‚Äòmaximalist‚Äô demands amid peace push
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi laid out Iran's demands and its reservations about US positions on Saturday as Islamabad hosted ‚Äãa new push to end a war that has killed thousands and roiled global markets. Though details of the talks were scant, Araqchi met Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: US to let Venezuela pay Maduro's lawyer in drug trafficking case
item.description: The United States has agreed to modify its sanctions ‚Äãon Venezuela to allow the South American country's government to pay Nicol√°s Maduro's defense lawyer, backing ‚Äåoff a restriction that had threatened to derail the drug trafficking case against the ousted Venezuelan president, a court Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: In top court fight against deportation shield, Trump says judges have no role
item.description: Among President Donald Trump's main arguments at the US Supreme Court defending his moves to rescind humanitarian protections that shield hundreds of thousands of immigrants from deportation, one stands out: Courts cannot review his administration's decisions in this area. Federal judges in New Yo Delivered by PolitePaul service
